issues.description: Filter uses maxCost:2, but card text specifies 'cost of 2 or more' (minimum 2, not maximum). Should use minCost:2.
Filter missing type requirement. Card text requires '{Straw Hat Crew} or {Heart Pirates}' type. Filter must include typeFilter with these types.

SearchDeck action incomplete. Card text specifies 'look at 4 cards from top' and 'place the rest at the bottom in any order' — this requires a multi-step process (reveal, filter, add to hand, arrange remainder). Current action only covers the search portion.
